name: PT Widodo Makmur Unggas Tbk
summary: PT Widodo Makmur Unggas Tbk engages in the integrated poultry business. It offers chicken feed, day old chicks, commercial broilers, eggs, and chicken meat. The company was formerly known as PT Pakan Makmur Perkasa and changed its name to PT Widodo Makmur Unggas Tbk in June 2017. PT Widodo Makmur Unggas Tbk was founded in 2015 and is based in East Jakarta, Indonesia.
